# AI-hint: GENERATED Quadlet pod for the co-resident group 'mios-netinfra-admin' (WS-7 pods-as-SSOT). DO NOT EDIT -- regenerate via tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py from [pods.mios-netinfra-admin] in mios.toml. Members (1): mios-cockpit-link.
# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-cockpit-link.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-netinfra-admin.pod
# System administration pod.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-netinfra-admin.pod):
#   mios-cockpit-link
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' Network infra admin pod
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Pod]
PodName=mios-netinfra-admin
Network=mios.network
PublishPort=0.0.0.0:${MIOS_PORT_COCKPIT_LINK:-19090}:19090

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
